title: Ken Rice
compiled_truth: Ken Rice is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-02 to 2002-01-24), Ken Rice sent 8 and received 311 emails, totalling 319 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (3), [David Cox](people/david-cox) (2), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (2), [Dorothy Dalton](people/dorothy-dalton) (2), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (1).
